title: Unallowable Costs Policy
content: Identifies categories of costs that may not be charged — directly or indirectly — to federally sponsored awards under federal cost principles (2 CFR 200 Subpart E) and similar sponsor regulations. Establishes university procedures to identify, segregate, and exclude unallowable costs from sponsored project accounts and from the F&A (indirect cost) rate calculation. Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
